title: Volatility muted amid uncertain economic outlook
section_path: Volatility muted amid uncertain economic outlook
section_path_text: Volatility muted amid uncertain economic outlook
summary:
Main
A weaker USD and signs of improvement in China's economy helped boost sentiment. Easing geopolitical tensions continue to hang over energy markets. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-11-28 150949.png | assets/2024-11-28_volatility-muted-amid-uncertain-economic-outlook_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_815eaf8beb6b.png

Market Commentary
Base metals edged higher as a weaker USD helped increase investor appetite.
